name: GreenGrow
description: MIS 330 group project: React + TypeScript frontend served by an ASP.NET Core 8 Web API with EF Core + MySQL (JawsDB).

PROJECT_FILE.description: Path to the .NET project to build (the dotnetcore buildpack uses this to pick the backend project, not the stray root csproj).

ASPNETCORE_ENVIRONMENT.description: Use the Production environment on Heroku so we don't read appsettings.Development.json.
